title: mirabilis nyctaginea var. eunyctaginea
intro: Mirabilis nyctaginea var. eunyctaginea, also known as the evening primrose, is a perennial herb native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and fever. The plant is rich in gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a polyunsaturated fatty acid that has been shown to have numerous health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving heart health. Evening primrose can be prepared as a tea, oil, or capsule, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
